news.headline: Trump believes the Fed should reduce rates to offset the impact of tariffs.
QXO to acquire Beacon Roofing Supply for $11 billion, with $124.35 per share in cash, creating a leading roofing distributor.
news.summary: In Greenwich, Conn. and Herndon, Va., QXO, Inc. (NYSE: QXO) and Beacon Roofing Supply, Inc. (Nasdaq: BECN) have confirmed a merger deal. QXO is set to purchase Beacon at a price of $124.35 per share in cash. Known for its distribution of roofing, waterproofing, and exterior products, Beacon boasts close to 600 branches spanning the United States and Canada. The acquisition has received unanimous approval from both companies' boards of directors. This significant transaction marks a notable valuation for Beacon.

news.headline: Vena's Excelerate Finance 2025 conference in Las Vegas from May 12-15 focuses on FP&A growth.
news.summary: Vena, a leading Complete Planning platform integrated with Microsoft 365, has revealed the return of Excelerate Finance for this year. The event, Excelerate 2025, will be held at The Wynn Hotel in Las Vegas from May 12-15. It aims to gather finance professionals, business leaders, analysts, and experts worldwide to brainstorm the future of FP&A and the office of finance. This conference is set to be bigger and better than before, offering valuable insights and networking opportunities for attendees.

news.headline: dunnhumby partners with Osmos to improve retail media, enhancing data science for retailers.
news.summary: In Cincinnati, dunnhumby, a prominent figure in customer data science globally, has recently unveiled a new addition to its retail media ecosystem. The company has collaborated with Osmos, an expert in advanced ad-serving technology, on the dunnhumby Retail Media Platform. This partnership is particularly significant as retailers are currently aiming to optimize the effectiveness of their retail media networks. Through the incorporation of Osmos' technology into its current retail media services, dunnhumby strengthens its position in the market.

news.headline: Global oncology small molecule drugs market to hit USD 167,635M by 2035, growing at 5.9% CAGR; valued at USD 94,494M in 2025.Key points:- Market opportunity of USD 15,889M between 2019-2024- North America to hold 34.6% market share in 2035- AstraZeneca, Bristol-Myers Squibb among leading players
news.summary: The global oncology small molecule drugs market is set to reach a valuation of USD 94,494 million in 2025, with an expected CAGR of 5.9% from 2025 to 2035. Targeted therapy is a key treatment method that uses specific medications to destroy cancer cells without harming regular cells, based on DNA alterations in cancer cells. Monoclonal antibodies play a crucial role in immunotherapy to enhance the immune system's functions. Market insights project growth to USD 167,635 million by 2035, creating an opportunity worth USD 15,889 million with a 5.0% CAGR between 2019 to 2024. North America is expected to hold a 34.6% market share in 2035. Key players in the market include AstraZeneca and Bristol-Myers Squibb Company. Research efforts on understanding cancer cell changes are driving the development of new targeted treatment drugs for cancer. Targeted therapy is used as an additional therapy for patients alongside surgery, chemotherapy, hormone therapy, and radiation therapy.

news.headline: Smallcakes Cupcakery opens new location in O'Fallon, MO, expanding its reach in St. Louis area. Largest cupcake chain in US.
news.summary: Renowned cupcake bakery Smallcakes Cupcakery & Creamery, the biggest cupcake chain in the nation, is excited to introduce their famous sweet treats to a new community in O'FALLON, Missouri. The new location in the St. Louis area is set to open this week, marking another milestone for the company. Founded in 2025, Smallcakes offers a wide variety of cupcakes and ice creams made with high-quality ingredients. This expansion adds to their existing network of stores and aims to bring their delicious confections to a broader audience.

news.headline: Nobu Hospitality to launch a luxury project in Manchester including hotel, restaurant, and UK's first Nobu residences.
news.summary: Nobu Hospitality, a renowned luxury lifestyle brand, has announced a major project in Manchester on March 20, 2025. The development includes a hotel, restaurant, and the debut of the first Nobu-branded residences in the UK. This initiative comes as a part of a collaboration with a top, award-winning company.

news.headline: LPG Group unveils Cellu M6 Infinity, a cutting-edge non-invasive beauty treatment after almost 40 years of innovation.
news.summary: In Fort Lauderdale, Florida on March 20, 2025, the LPG® Group, known for their non-invasive beauty, wellness, and therapeutic solutions, has introduced their newest product, the Cellu M6 Infinity®. Representing almost 40 years of development, this cutting-edge technology aims to revolutionize the industry.

news.headline: Baozun Inc. (Nasdaq: BZUN, HKEX: 9991) released unaudited financials for Q4 and FY 2024. Key numbers pending.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, in Shanghai, Baozun Inc. (traded as Nasdaq: BZUN and HKEX: 9991) shared its unaudited financial outcomes for the fourth quarter. Baozun is a prominent e-commerce solution provider in China.

news.headline: Challenges in quantifying AI's impact on productivity discussed in recent report, highlighting difficulties in accurate measurement.

US stocks set to rise after Fed predicts 'transitory' tariff-induced inflation. Futures up:- Nasdaq 100: +0.46%- S&P 500: +0.40%- Dow Jones: +0.29%- Russell 2000: +0.44%Fed projects 2 rate cuts in 2025. 82.6% chance interest rates to be held steady in May. Yields: 10-year at 4.22%, 2-year at 3.97%. Notable rebound by Nvidia and Boeing. Nasdaq in correction territory, down 11.19% from peak. DJ down 6.70%, S&P down 7.68% from 52-week highs.
news.summary: U.S. stock futures rose post FOMC decision, with all benchmark indices higher. Fed projects two 2025 rate cuts. Treasury yields: 10-year 4.22%, two-year 3.97%. Fed expected to maintain rates in May with 82.6% certainty. Futures change: Nasdaq 0.46%, S&P 0.40%, Dow Jones 0.29%, Russell 2000 0.44%. SPY and QQQ ETFs rise premarket. S&P 500 surged on energy, tech, consumer discretionary sectors. Stagflation concerns arise due to lower growth, higher inflation. Nvidia up 1.8%, Boeing up 7%. Nasdaq 100 in correction, Dow Jones and S&P 500 down from highs. Index performance: Nasdaq Composite 1.41%, S&P 500 1.08%, Dow Jones 0.92%, Russell 2000 1.57%. Market volatility persists due to tariff uncertainties.

news.headline: ReconAfrica accelerates drilling to Q2 2025, corporate update given by President and CEO Brian Reinsborough.
news.summary: Reconnaissance Energy Africa Ltd., also known as ReconAfrica, has revealed plans to speed up drilling activities until the second quarter of 2025. The company, publicly traded under the tickers TSXV: RECO, OTCQX: RECAF, Frankfurt: 0XD, and NSX: REC, shared this update along with other corporate news. Brian Reinsborough, serving as the President and CEO of the company, led the announcement.

news.headline: Marksmen Network's CX Transformation Conclave in Bangalore on March 20, 2025, focuses on technology redefining customer journeys for business growth.
news.summary: Marksmen Network's CX Transformation Conclave in Bangalore, India on March 20, 2025, will showcase the impact of technology on reshaping customer journeys and boosting business expansion. In a time dominated by digital advancements, the focus is on delivering outstanding customer experiences.

news.headline: Halfpricesoft.com introduces new ez1095 ACA Software to help streamline 1095 eFiling, meeting March 31 deadline.
news.summary: Halfpricesoft has announced the release of their latest ez1095 2024 Affordable Care Act software ahead of the March 31 eFile deadline. The software, based in REDMOND, Wash., offers a network/multi-user release designed for growing companies. This software enables clients to efficiently process their ACA forms. This release is crucial for companies to meet the deadline and ensure compliance as they file their forms. With this software, companies can streamline their ACA reporting processes and avoid potential penalties. For more information, contact Halfpricesoft.

news.headline: Camping Àmfora in Sant Pere Pescador named Best Campsite in Spain & top in Europe by DCC Europa-Preis. #Girona #Award
news.summary: The DCC Europa-Preis, a prestigious award in the camping industry, was recently granted to Camping Àmfora in Sant Pere Pescador, Spain. This recognition was provided by the renowned Deutscher Camping Club (DCC), a prominent caravan club. Camping Àmfora's outstanding services and facilities have earned them this esteemed honor, solidifying their position as a top destination for campers. This achievement showcases the campground's dedication to excellence and customer satisfaction.

news.headline: ARI’s RAM wins GovForum’s award for revolutionizing government procurement with cutting-edge technology, reducing acquisition timelines.
news.summary: The Applied Research Institute (ARI) in Bloomington, Indiana, has been honored for its groundbreaking work in defense innovation by receiving GovForum’s Disruptive Program Award for the Rapid Acquisition Marketplace (RAM). This recognition showcases ARI's pioneering efforts in transforming government procurement processes, leading to significantly shortened acquisition timelines and granting quicker access to state-of-the-art technology. With the RAM, ARI is spearheading a shift towards efficiency in government practices, already expediting Department of Defense acquisitions.

news.headline: LTP acquires Spanish crypto firm TCB to expand in Europe. TCB is licensed by the Bank of Spain.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, in Madrid, LTP, a prominent institutional prime brokerage focused on digital asset markets, revealed its complete acquisition of Turing Capital Brokerage (TCB). TCB, a Spanish brokerage firm authorized by the Bank of Spain for Markets operations, has now been fully taken over by LTP.

news.headline: Pete Carril, Jr. joins Amore Sports Management Advisory Board, bringing over 40 years of expertise in investment management.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, in New York, it was shared that Pete Carril, Jr. has become a part of the Advisory Board at Amore Sports Management. Bringing over 40 years of experience in investment management, Pete is set to offer valuable insights in global trading and risk management. His extensive background in the field marks a significant addition to the board, showcasing the company's commitment to furthering its strategic capabilities.

news.headline: Golidocitinib combined with anti-PD-1 effective for anti-PD-1 resistant NSCLC. Dizal aims to further advance treatment.
news.summary: Golidocitinib, a selective JAK1 inhibitor, recently gained approval for treating relapsed or refractory PTCL. When paired with a PD-1 antibody, golidocitinib displayed enhanced anti-tumor effects, particularly noted in cases of anti-PD-1-resistant NSCLC. This promising combination was observed and tested in SHANGHAI on March 20, 2025. Dizal (SSE: 688192), the company behind this development, is at the forefront of advancing such innovative treatments.

news.headline: Cambridge Investment Research named Top Workplace USA for fifth year in a row, serving 3,800 financial professionals nationwide.
news.summary: Cambridge Investment Research, Inc. ("Cambridge"), a financial solutions firm catering to 3,800 financial professionals nationwide, has been honored with the prestigious Top Workplace USA award for the fifth consecutive year. The recognition was a result of positive feedback from associates. The company is based in Fairfield, Iowa.

news.headline: Total global government and corporate bond debt exceeds $100 trillion in 2024 - OECD.
Almost 45% of OECD countries' government debt and 40% of emerging market governments' debt will mature by 2027 - OECD.
Parcels from China facing Trump's tariffs have seen a drop in numbers.
Ensign Group, Inc. declares quarterly dividend of $0.0625 per share, payable on April 30, 2025 to shareholders as of March 31, 2025.
news.summary: In San Juan Capistrano, California, on March 20, 2025, The Ensign Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: ENSG) revealed a quarterly cash dividend of $0.0625 per share of Ensign common stock. This dividend is set to be paid by April 30, 2025, to shareholders recorded as of March 31, 2025. The Ensign Group, Inc. is the parent entity of the Ensign™ group of companies specializing in skilled nursing, senior living services, therapies (physical, occupational, speech), rehabilitative services, healthcare services, and real estate investments.

news.headline: 22nd Century Group reveals Q4 & full year 2024 results. Unveils 2025 strategy using internal & external assets in various categories.
news.summary: The company has unveiled its 2025 growth plan that focuses on utilizing its internal and external brand assets in various categories. This strategy aims to boost performance and drive expansion in the coming years.

news.headline: Auddia adds new AI model to its faidr app for enhanced user experience, improving audio quality by 35%.
Orezone Gold's 2024 revenue and net income hit record high. Details in financial report, with $X million revenue.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, Orezone Gold Corporation (TSX: ORE, OTCQX: ORZCF) has released its performance data for the fourth quarter and full year concluding on December 31, 2024, alongside its projections for 2025. The company expressed contentment in sharing its operational and financial results. All figures are denoted in USD unless specified otherwise, with "M" representing million.

news.headline: Titan Mining Corporation met its 2024 production target and saved 10% on costs from the low end of its AISC guidance.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia on March 20, 2025, Titan Mining Corporation (TSX: TI, OTCQB: TIMCF) shared its 2024 year-end results. Despite production suspension from Storm Debby in Q3 2024, the company met the upper limit of its 2024 production guidance. Costs remained 10% under the lower end of the all-in sustaining costs (AISC) guidance at its Empire State Mines. The figures discussed are in U.S. dollars.

FactSet announces Q2 results for fiscal 2025, ended Feb 28, 2025. Company provides global financial digital platform.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, in Norwalk, Connecticut, FactSet ("FactSet" or the "Company"), which is listed on NYSE:FDS and NASDAQ:FDS, a worldwide financial digital platform and enterprise solutions provider, revealed its financial performance for the second quarter of fiscal 2025 concluding on February 28, 2025.

news.headline: EU's Trade Chief Sefcovic: The European Commission is considering delaying first set of counter-tariffs against the US to mid-April.
Origence Lending Services expands to 167 credit unions, serving 360k members by 2024, using AI for document stacking.
news.summary: With the utilization of an AI-Powered technology solution, a division has achieved a significant milestone in document stacking. The innovative technology has enabled the division to efficiently process and organize a large number of documents, reaching a milestone of sorting through and stacking 100,000 documents in a fraction of the time it would have traditionally taken. This remarkable achievement showcases the power and effectiveness of integrating AI technology into document management systems.

news.headline: US stocks to open higher after Fed's statement on transitory inflation post tariffs. Futures of benchmark indices up in premarket trading. Indices show slight increase. Fed predicts maintaining rates in May meeting with high probability. S&P 500 and Nasdaq 100 ETFs increased. Notable changes in sectors and specific stocks. Nasdaq 100 remains in correction territory. Fed's dot plot shows concerns about growth and inflation. Market volatile due to tariff uncertainty.
news.summary: The US stock futures rose post the Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) decision, with all four benchmark indices showing gains during premarket trading. Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell stated the inflation due to Trump's tariffs would be transitory and the "dot plot" indicated two potential rate cuts in 2025. The 10-year Treasury yield was at 4.22%, the two-year yield at 3.97%. The chance of the Fed keeping interest rates steady in May stands at 82.6%, as per the CME Group's FedWatch. The Nasdaq 100, S&P 500, Dow Jones, and Russell 2000 saw increases in futures. Notable stock movements include Nvidia Corp. rising 1.8% and Boeing Co. surging nearly 7%. The indices such as Nasdaq 100, Dow Jones, and S&P 500 have dropped by 11.19%, 6.70%, and 7.68% respectively from their yearly highs.

Saviynt to feature identity security solutions at Gartner IAM Summit 2025, focusing on zero trust security and compliance.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, Saviynt, a prominent cloud-native identity and governance solutions provider, revealed its involvement in the Gartner Identity & Access Management Summit 2025 scheduled for March 24-25 in London, U.K. The company will present its newest advancements in identity governance, privileged access management (PAM), and identity security to assist organizations in attaining zero-trust security and compliance at large levels. Additionally, as part of the summit, Saviynt will also showcase.

Lloyds Banking Group partners with Oracle for tech transformation, using Oracle Database@Azure & Exadata Cloud@Customer to accelerate cloud migration for faster product delivery and new capabilities.
news.summary: A prominent financial services firm in the UK has recently implemented Oracle Database@Azure and Oracle Exadata Cloud@Customer to expedite its transition to the cloud. By leveraging these technologies, the company aims to enhance its operational efficiency and introduce new offerings promptly. The organization announced this strategic move during the Oracle CloudWorld Tour in London on March 20, 2025. This decision is expected to facilitate the swift delivery of innovative products and services.

news.headline: Kremlin: Plans for Europe’s militarisation are at odds with the mood of Russia and the United States.
Cognite opens new India Center in Bengaluru to leverage AI for industrial growth, focusing on data-driven innovation.
news.summary: Cognite has launched its India Center of Excellence in Bengaluru, showing its dedication to utilizing AI for industrial advancement. This move underlines the company's focus on leveraging cutting-edge technology for growth. The center is set to be a hub for innovation and development, with a strong emphasis on harnessing data for industrial applications. This initiative highlights Cognite's investment in India's tech sector, promising significant opportunities for AI development and industrial progress.
